name: Opus 4.7 Rejects Manual Thinking (Wave 3, Request-Shape Regression)
description: Per live /v1/models capability API (2026-04-17) and Anthropic docs, Opus 4.7 returns 400 for thinking: {type: 'enabled'}. This scenario verifies the PLUGIN never sends manual-thinking mode to Opus 4.7, so we never get the 400 in the first place. Evidence is request-only: assert pluginCapture.parsedBody.thinking.type !== 'enabled' when model matches /claude-opus-4-7/.
prompt: Solve this: explain the Monty Hall problem in 2 sentences.
expectedBehavior: pluginCapture.parsedBody.thinking.type is 'adaptive' (NOT 'enabled'). If the plugin sends 'enabled' to Opus 4.7, that's the bug. No response-status proof required — request-shape diff is the evidence.
